sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91297" key="ptwxotrofei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτωχοτροφ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n91297.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poorhouse,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2.19</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.37.3.3</biblScope> </bibl> (as Lat. word), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
